title: Cylindrolobus uniflorus
taxonomy: Cylindrolobus uniflorus is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Graphidaceae. This species is classified as a type of Graphidaceae, which is a family of lichens that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification within the family is Cylindrolobus uniflorus (Kremp.) Staiger. Within the kingdom Fungi, Cylindrolobus uniflorus is classified as Ascomycota. The species is also classified as a type of Graphis, which is a genus of lichens in the family Graphidaceae.
